ogTitle: Pura Pura vs Purnim: Climate Safety

heading: Pura Pura vs Purnim — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pura Pura, Victoria and Purnim, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pura Pura has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Purnim (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pura Pura or Purnim safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pura Pura has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Purnim scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pura Pura scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Purnim scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pura Pura or Purnim?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pura Pura has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
